title: Eva trading cards Carddass 20
wikitext:
[]: Eva trading cards - Carddass 2.0?             Quote Post by giuliano » Fri Oct 16, 2009 4:07 pm I've recently bought the last few cards I needed for my Carddass Masters Rebuild 1.0 set and it occurred to me I've not seen any news about a 2.0 set being released... I think the 1.0 set was out quite close to the movie's release, has anyone heard anything about a 2.0 set? thanks! ^ ^

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Oct 16, 2009 4:11 pm ...I didn't even know there was a 1.0 Card set! Is it up on Evastore somewhere?

[]:             Quote Post by giuliano » Fri Oct 16, 2009 4:23 pm Just did a quick search on evastore and couldn't see the 1.0 set on there, I bought mine from ebay ^ ^; http://cgi.ebay.co.uk/EVANGELION-New-Movie-JO-Trading-Card-81-Reg-Complete_W0QQitemZ250447585548QQcmdZViewItemQQptZLH_DefaultDomain_0?hash=item3a4fd6e10c there's some good pics of the regular cards...

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Oct 16, 2009 4:38 pm Whoa, that is really awesome. I'd love if there would be card sets for each of the four movies. (Speaking of, I wonder when the heck the Entry File 2 book for 2.0 will be out. The one for 1.0 was out sort of soon...) So are the 1.0 Cardass cards meant to be similar to those original NGE Cardass cards? Eg, this on the back side? Japanese text on the card is this: "In the Sea of LCL, Shinji wished for a world with other people. He desired to meet them again, even if it meant he would be hurt and betrayed. And just as he had hoped/wanted, Asuka was present in the new world. Only Asuka was there beside him. The girl whom he had hurt, and who had been hurt by him. But even so, she was the one he had hoped/wished for...." Thanks.

[]:             Quote Post by giuliano » Fri Oct 16, 2009 5:10 pm hmmm, the back of that card doesn't seem familiar XP Which set is that from? I've got the PP1 & PP2 sets, the carddass master sets 1, 2, Death&Rebirth, End of Eva and Rebuild 1.0... The backs of the 1.0 set tend to either be smaller versions of the pic on the front of the card or like the one you posted with a different pic and text, like so: [URL=http://img28.imageshack.us/i/dsc000723.jpg/] [/URL]

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Oct 16, 2009 5:38 pm Cool. The sauce of that scan is from this series: Eva Cardass Masters card made back in 1998 or so, I'm guessing.

[]:             Quote Post by Zeak » Sat Nov 07, 2009 6:47 am I ended up getting one out of one of those magazines I have. There an interesting set but they seem different from these.
